mapper.select: SELECT * FROM crm_inquiry WHERE deleted = 0 AND inquiry_no = #{inquiryNo} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_inquiry WHERE deleted = 0 AND status IN ('NEW', 'PROCESSING')
AND assigned_to = #{ownerId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_inquiry WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'CONVERTED'
AND assigned_to = #{ownerId}
